generated_oml:
instance Building : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Physical building asset in AECO domain"
]

instance BcsSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors in Building Control Systems for monitoring building parameters"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BcsSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance BcsSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BcsSensor
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange for continuous synchronization between physical building and digital twin"
]

instance BcsSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data values processed by the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BcsSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance BuildingInformationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representations enhanced with semantic data for Building Control Systems components including sensors, actuators, and controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance RealTimeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insights for monitoring building conditions"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for potential infrastructure issues"
]

instance OptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated actions for optimizing building operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring with interactive visualization interfaces for building conditions and control"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for infrastructure operations supporting operational decision-making"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of infrastructure operations for efficiency and resource management"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationAction
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Transforms enriched BIM models into structured digital twin artifacts and manages evolution through modular architecture with standardized extension points for custom services and analytics integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService
]

instance BcsActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators within Building Control Systems for controlling building systems"
]

instance BcsController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controllers within Building Control Systems for managing actuator operations"
]

instance AECOBuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Building, BuildingInformationModel, ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler, RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService, BcsSensor, BcsActuator, BcsController
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environment (defining sensors, actuators, controllers), transformation via Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) to extract structured representations and generate deployable artifacts, followed by runtime operations and evolution through custom service development by DT Engineers. Transition between phases is automated through MDE principles with minimal manual intervention, supported by role-based governance where Building Control Engineers handle modeling, Facility Managers monitor operations, and DT Engineers extend functionality."
]
